name: Far Gear
description:
While attuned to this device, you have a +1 bonus to Charisma saving throws, and you have advantage on Charisma ({@skill Intimidation}) checks.

This functions as the {@spell conjure celestial} spell (no {@status concentration} required), except the creature you summon is an aberration of challenge rating 4 or lower.
